title: Add city and state with zip code to technician search

requirements.summary: Update the TechnicianFinder search interface to display city and state alongside zip code for each technician result
acceptanceCriteria: Technician search results show city name when available
Technician search results show state when available
Display format clearly presents zip code, city, and state together (e.g., 'City, State ZIP')
Gracefully handles missing city or state data

file_operations.description: Update the technician result cards to display city and state fields from the Technician type. Format the location display as 'City, State ZIP' (e.g., 'Phoenix, AZ 85001'). Handle cases where city or state may be empty strings by conditionally rendering only available fields. Update the result card layout to accommodate the expanded location information while maintaining visual hierarchy and readability.
